diagram_title: Maintain Compaction Anchor As Redacted Dialog History

activities.title: Extend Anchor With Redacted Tail
activities.description: On every compaction commit via the narrative kind, build anchor[n+1] body as anchor[n] body concatenated with serialised, redacted dialog from the messages between previous anchor and now (excluding the unanswered user msg). Markdown format with role markers and recall_id references for tool outputs

activities.title: Detect Anchor Size Threshold
activities.description: Estimate token count of newly written anchor body (chars/4 heuristic). Compare against floor (5K skip) and ceiling (50K force-trigger). Decide whether to schedule recompress

activities.title: Recompress Anchor Via Provider Dispatch
activities.description: When anchor size exceeds ceiling, dispatch by provider: codex sessions invoke /responses/compact server-side; non-codex sessions invoke Hybrid.runHybridLlm LLM-grade compaction. On success, overwrite anchor body in place with the LLM-distilled summary

activities.title: Render LLM-Visible Context With Tool Output Redaction
activities.description: Per-iteration post-anchor stream rendering: pass-through all messages (no role-level drops, replacing v6 logic), per-tool-part replace state.output with recall_id reference. Preserves dialog continuity while bounding tool payload bulk

activities.title: Provide Tool Output Recall Path
activities.description: When model needs original tool output, MCP recall_toolcall_raw resolves part.id via working-cache.deriveLedger walking Session.messages. No separate persistence layer; storage is source of truth

activities.title: Serialize Dialog Round To Markdown
activities.description: Pure function: take messages array, produce markdown text with ## Round N headers, **User**/**Assistant**/**Reasoning** sections, **Tool**: name(args) → recall_id: part.id lines. Optional excludeUserMessageID parameter for Spec 1 synergy
